@everyone

Project Galia

WE'RE BACK! Get ready for an incredible year of Star Atlas.

If you missed it, our Chief Leaks Officer spilled the beans on a project our gameplay engineer, @MagicPuncher, was working on. Enjoy a first look at what navigating the Star Atlas universe could look like, with no loading screens! 

Note: Keep in mind that this was an internal demo, and as always, things may evolve.
